input: Alexander Isak to Liverpool — here we go! Newcastle accept British-record £125m. Medical booked. (Fabrizio Romano)
Spurs keen on Antoine Semenyo, monitoring his Bournemouth situation this summer.
Marc Guéhi will NOT join Liverpool — the deal collapsed on deadline day, he stays at Crystal Palace. (David Ornstein)
Unreal performance from Florian Wirtz tonight, what a player.
Newcastle in talks with Stuttgart over Nick Woltemade, negotiations ongoing.
Arsenal closing in on Eberechi Eze, advanced talks with Crystal Palace over a deal.
Bayern reach full agreement with Luis Díaz on personal terms; fee talks with Liverpool still ongoing.
OFFICIAL: Viktor Gyökeres joins Arsenal from Sporting CP.
Hugo Ekitike in town for his Liverpool medical ahead of a £79m move from Eintracht Frankfurt.
Jonathan Tah completes a free transfer to Bayern Munich from Bayer Leverkusen.
Rumours linking Rodrygo with Arsenal again, one to watch this window.
Busy night for Chelsea: they sign João Pedro from Brighton, and are also closing in on Jamie Gittens.
Man Utd have agreed personal terms with Bryan Mbeumo; Brentford want £65m.
Sky Sports: Sunderland have signed Granit Xhaka from Bayer Leverkusen.
Kevin De Bruyne picked up a knock in training, a doubt for the weekend.

Elliot Anderson to Man City: Midfielder's record-breaking £116m transfer from Nottingham Forest announced — Elliot Anderson's record-breaking £116m transfer to Manchester City from Nottingham Forest has been announced. The deal makes midfielder Anderson, 23, the most expensive British player ever.
Chelsea transfer news: Marco Palestra signs from Serie A side Atalanta in deal worth £43m — Chelsea have completed the signing of Marco Palestra from Atalanta in a deal worth £43m.

Tottenham agree potential £100m Sandro Tonali deal with Newcastle - sources — Tottenham are set to smash their transfer record for the second time in a matter of days after agreeing a deal worth up to £100 million ($133m) to sign Sandro Tonali from Newcastle United, sources have told ESPN.
Manchester City have reached an agreement with Leicester City to sign 16-year-old Jeremy Monga for £12.5m plus a sell-on clause

Michael Olise has reportedly asked for a meeting with Bayern Munich about his future amid attention from Real Madrid, PSG and Premier League clubs; the 24-year-old France winger wants to discuss his status after the World Cup.
Chelsea are in advanced talks to sign Rayo Vallecano defender Pep Chavarria, with a deal now close for the 28-year-old left back.

Man Utd: West Ham's Crysencio Summerville emerging as a top left-wing target for Michael Carrick's side — Crysencio Summerville is emerging as a leading left-wing target for Manchester United, Sky Sports News understands.
Transfer rumors, news: Milan tracking Liverpool's Van Dijk

Man Utd transfer news: Aurelien Tchouameni and Alex Scott high on midfield shortlist — Real Madrid's Aurelien Tchouameni and Bournemouth's Alex Scott are high on Manchester United's list of targets to strengthen their midfield this summer; West Ham's Crysencio Summerville is their favoured option for the left wing.

Georgia Stanway: Arsenal sign Lionesses midfielder after Bayern Munich departure — Arsenal have confirmed the signing of Georgia Stanway on a permanent deal; the 27-year-old midfielder joins after leaving Bayern Munich.

Cristiano Ronaldo to be coached by Ange Postecoglou after Australian appointed by Al Nassr — Ange Postecoglou has been named as the new Al Nassr boss in the Saudi Pro League, where he will coach Cristiano Ronaldo.

England 2-1 DR Congo player ratings: Harry Kane and Anthony Gordon save the day as Djed Spence struggles at right-back — England had to come from behind to beat DR Congo in the last 32 of the 2026 World Cup; Harry Kane scored two late goals to earn a 2-1 win.
